removed.natural_language: When CPack or CMake fails with file INSTALL cannot find .../op_kernel/binary/config, do not keep blindly rerunning make package; instead confirm build_out/op_kernel/binary/config exists and, if it is missing, re-run CMake to regenerate the full install tree before packaging again.
When the build fails with file INSTALL cannot find .../binary/config, do not hand-copy fake files into that path; instead ensure the build or CMake steps create binary/config before packaging.

When CMake or CPack fails with file INSTALL cannot find .../op_kernel/binary/config, do not ignore the packaging error; instead ensure the build step creates that config directory and a consistent install layout before retrying package or install.
